summary: A Fox News 'Special Report' segment (FOX NEWS ALERT banners) recapping Sec. Noem's Latin America trip: it opens with the recurring Noem-at-CECOT clip and a screenshotted Noem tweet about meeting Mexico's president, then cuts to anchor Harris Faulkner interviewing DHS Asst. Sec. Tricia McLaughlin (remote, before a U.S. flag and DHS seal) who praises Noem's leadership versus VP Harris. Anchor/official talking with news lower-thirds, no music track. Cable-news interview, not produced youth-appeal content.
notable_text: NOEM: IF YOU COME TO OUR COUNTRY ILLEGALLY, YOU WILL BE REMOVED AND PROSECUTED; NOEM MEETS WITH MEXICO'S PRESIDENT: 'STILL MORE WORK TO BE DONE'; NOEM VISITS LATIN AMERICA TO TALK CRIME, MIGRATION; FOX NEWS ALERT
